description: Style Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte. This top from Tonga is a definite must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple by pairing up this trendy top with flats and jeggings or dark coloured cotton capris. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual! Product Details Black, grey, white and red one shoulder top with geometric patterns, has a broad elasticated and ruched hemline, a black satin asymmetrical neckline, batwing right sleeve Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash cold Do not bleach Hang dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
